summary: Completed testing of Product Features: Display Tags, Personalization Conditional, Calendar Disabled Dates, and Bundle Selectors. All 12 backend API tests passed. All 6 frontend UI tests passed. Features working correctly: 1) TOY products don't show personalization fields, 2) CAKE products show personalization fields, 3) Calendar disables past dates, 4) HAMPER products show bundle selectors (Select Cake, Select Toy), 5) Display tags API working, 6) Product badges displayed correctly.
seed_data_creation: Product shopify-8661308375194 (Googly Ghoul Dognuts) has display_tags: ['best-seller', 'popular']
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product features fully functional. Display tags API at /api/admin/products/tag-options and /api/admin/products/{id}/display-tags. Personalization fields conditional based on product category (cakes, hampers, meals show them; accessories/toys don't). Calendar uses disabled prop to prevent past date selection. Bundle selectors appear for hamper products.

backend_api_tests.test_get_tag_options: PASS - Returns 9 tag options (best-seller, limited, selling-fast, discount, new-arrival, staff-pick, popular, seasonal, exclusive)
backend_api_tests.test_update_product_display_tags: PASS - Updates display_tags on product and persists correctly
backend_api_tests.test_clear_display_tags: PASS - Allows clearing tags with empty array
backend_api_tests.test_products_list_includes_display_tags: PASS - Products with display_tags return them in API
backend_api_tests.test_cakes_api_for_bundle_selection: PASS - Returns cake products for bundle dropdown
backend_api_tests.test_accessories_api_for_toy_selection: PASS - Returns toy products for bundle dropdown
backend_api_tests.test_get_admin_product_details: PASS - Returns full product details for admin
backend_api_tests.test_update_bundle_config: PASS - Updates bundle configuration on hamper products

frontend_ui_tests.cake_personalization_fields: PASS - Cake product modal shows: Personalization section, Pet's Name input, Pet's Age input, Date picker, Time selector
frontend_ui_tests.toy_no_personalization_fields: PASS - Toy product (Puppuccino Toy) does NOT show personalization fields
frontend_ui_tests.calendar_past_dates_disabled: PASS - Calendar shows January 2026, dates 1-15 are disabled, 16+ are selectable
frontend_ui_tests.hamper_bundle_selectors: PASS - Hamper product shows: 'Customize Your Hamper' section, 'Select Cake' dropdown, 'Select Toy' dropdown
frontend_ui_tests.product_badges_display: PASS - Googly Ghoul Dognuts shows '🏆 Best Seller' and '💜 Popular' badges
frontend_ui_tests.product_cards_loading: PASS - Product cards load correctly on all category pages

personalization_conditional.description: Personalization fields (Pet's Name, Age, Date, Time) only show for food products (cakes, hampers, meals, pupcakes, dognuts). Non-food products (toys, accessories) don't show these fields.

calendar_disabled_dates.description: Calendar component uses disabled prop to prevent selection of past dates. Today and future dates are selectable.

display_tags_system.description: Admin can set display_tags on products via API. Tags appear as badges on product cards.

bundle_selectors.description: Hamper products show 'Customize Your Hamper' section with Select Cake and Select Toy dropdowns. Dropdowns are populated from /api/products?category=cakes and /api/products?category=accessories APIs.

screenshots: .screenshots/cake_modal.png - Shows personalization fields for cake product
.screenshots/toy_modal.png - Shows NO personalization fields for toy product
.screenshots/calendar_open.png - Shows calendar with past dates disabled
.screenshots/hamper_modal.png - Shows bundle selectors for hamper product
.screenshots/dognuts_products.png - Shows product badges on Googly Ghoul Dognuts
